title: ilex × owariensis
intro: Ilex × owariensis is a hybrid plant species between Ilex aquifolium and Ilex crenata, commonly known as a holly tree. The plant contains compounds with medicinal properties, including alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Ilex × owariensis is believed to have several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support immune function, cardiovascular health, and digestive well-being.
